report.summary: Built 2 new learn guides — Bitcoin Safe-Haven Analysis (timely with Iran crisis + gold $5K) and BTC Yield/BTCFi Earning Strategies (actionable guide covering Babylon, Solv, CoreDAO, BounceBit) — with full SEO optimization, structured data, and PUBLISH_QUEUE entries.

sections.title: Research Brief
items: Bitcoin safe-haven thesis tested by 2026 Iran conflict: BTC dropped 47% from $126K ATH to ~$68K while gold breached $5,000/oz
BTC-gold trailing 12-month correlation near zero (0.01); dropped to -0.88 during acute crisis
Spot Bitcoin ETF inflows of $890M in March despite volatility; Morgan Stanley filing own MSBT ETF
US Strategic Bitcoin Reserve holds ~328,000 BTC; BITCOIN Act proposes 200K BTC/year purchases
BTCFi TVL stabilized at ~$10B; Solv Protocol at $2.4B TVL with 800K users; SolvBTC yields 4-6% APY
BounceBit CeDeFi platform has $5B+ deployed; CoreDAO evolving into Bitcoin Power Grid infrastructure
Babylon leads BTCFi restaking market share with native BTC staking (no bridge required)
Institutional digital asset flows shifting: BTC ETFs represented just 6.5% of flows in March vs 34% in January; $12.8B went to tokenized treasuries

sections.title: Content Created
items: Bitcoin Safe Haven Guide 2026 (~3,200 words, 12 min read): Covers safe-haven definition, BTC vs gold 2026 scoreboard, Iran crisis stress test, ETF flow analysis, US Strategic Reserve impact, correlation data, crisis vs debasement hedge framework, portfolio positioning strategies

BTC Yield & BTCFi Earning Strategies Guide 2026 (~3,400 words, 13 min read): Covers yield source taxonomy, Babylon native staking, Solv Protocol/SolvBTC liquid staking, CoreDAO dual-token model, BounceBit CeDeFi, protocol comparison table, risk framework with severity ratings, strategies by risk tolerance (conservative/moderate/aggressive)

sections.title: SEO Optimization
items: Page 1 — Title: 'Bitcoin Safe Haven 2026: Is BTC a Hedge Against Geopolitical Risk?' | Target keyword: bitcoin safe haven | Schemas: Article + FAQ (6 questions)
Page 2 — Title: 'BTC Yield Strategies 2026: How to Earn 3-8% APY on Your Bitcoin' | Target keyword: btc yield strategies | Schemas: Article + FAQ (6 questions)
Both pages include OG + Twitter card metadata, internal links to 5+ related pages each, comparison tables, structured FAQ sections for featured snippet targeting
Pages added to PUBLISH_QUEUE in src/lib/published-pages.ts

sections.title: Interactive Components
items: No new interactive components needed — both are learn/guide pages with static content, comparison tables, and info cards following existing architecture

sections.title: Build Verification
items: TypeScript type-check passed (no errors in new files with --skipLibCheck)
Both pages follow existing learn page architecture exactly (badges, gradient H1, stats box, disclaimer, TOC, numbered sections, FAQ, related links)
